name: codex-api-installer
description: Codex API installer and model source manager for Windows

scripts.dist:original: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.original.json --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:manager: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.manager.json --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.original.json --win portable --x64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.manager.json --win portable --x64
